PR surface: Source +64, Docs -1, Config 0, Other 0. Total +63 across 13 files.

target.title: chore: bump Codex app-server to 0.137.0
target.body:
## Summary

- Bump the managed Codex app-server package from `@openai/codex` `0.135.0` to `0.137.0` in the Codex plugin manifest, pnpm lockfile, npm shrinkwrap, and managed runtime version constant.
- Refresh the selected generated Codex app-server protocol JSON schemas from the sibling `../codex` checkout at tag `rust-v0.137.0`.
- Refresh the Codex harness docs model-list snapshot from a `@openai/codex@0.137.0` app-server `model/list` probe; the visible catalog no longer includes `gpt-5.3-codex-spark`.

## Dependency Contract Proof

- Checked upstream `../codex` at `rust-v0.137.0` (`f221438b69`).
- Checked `../codex/codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/v2/ModelListResponse.ts:6` and `../codex/codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/v2/Model.ts:11` for the `model/list` response shape, including the new `defaultServiceTier` field at `../codex/codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/v2/Model.ts:16`.
- Checked `../codex/codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/v2/ThreadStartResponse.ts:11`, `../codex/codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/v2/TurnStartResponse.ts:6`, `../codex/codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/v2/GetAccountResponse.ts:6`, and `../codex/codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/v2/TurnCompletedNotification.ts:6` for the app-server protocol responses OpenClaw validates.

## Verification

- `pnpm docs:list`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/manifest.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol-validators.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/models.test.ts extensions/codex/provider.test.ts`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx`
- `node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); for (const f of ["extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol-generated/json/DynamicToolCallParams.json","extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol-generated/json/v2/ErrorNotification.json","extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol-generated/json/v2/GetAccountResponse.json","extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol-generated/json/v2/ModelListResponse.json","extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol-generated/json/v2/ThreadResumeResponse.json","extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol-generated/json/v2/ThreadStartResponse.json","extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol-generated/json/v2/TurnCompletedNotification.json","extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol-generated/json/v2/TurnStartResponse.json"]) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,"utf8")); console.log("protocol json ok")'`
- `npx -y @openai/codex@0.137.0 codex app-server model/list` equivalent JSON-RPC probe through `app-server --listen stdio://` returned visible models `gpt-5.5`, `gpt-5.4`, `gpt-5.4-mini`, `gpt-5.3-codex`, and `gpt-5.2`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings.

## Notes

- `pnpm codex-app-server:protocol:check` could not complete locally because the cloned Codex cargo path hit a Homebrew dynamic-link failure: `libgit2.1.9.2.dylib` requires missing `libllhttp.9.3.dylib`. The generated schema files were refreshed directly from the checked-out upstream `rust-v0.137.0` committed schema outputs instead.
target.author: romneyda
